case_title: CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. ANA ELIZABETH COTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT COTO, ANA ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COTO, ANA ELIZABETH $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH SHEILA ROBLETO (TITLE: SR. COLLECTION OFFICER). THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.50) SERVED JAN-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COTO, ANA ELIZABETH
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT COTO, ANA ELIZABETH
